_comment: Baseline numbers for the FLOW-07 / UC-02 nightly k6 load run (STEP-13). Populated from the first successful run of .github/workflows/cv-load-test.yml; the workflow's regression gate fails when iteration_duration p(95) exceeds 110% of the value below. Update this file in a small chore PR after each material cv-service / documents-service / RabbitMQ topology change so the gate keeps a meaningful target.
